description: Outreach to a locksmith for a lock rekey should inquire about availability and cost with appropriate urgency.

task.title: Rekey locks for Unit 7A
task.body: Previous tenant moved out of Unit 7A at Hilltop Residences. All exterior locks need to be rekeyed before the new tenant moves in next week.

context:
Property: Hilltop Residences, 1200 Summit Blvd, Tacoma, WA 98402
Unit: 7A
Vendor: SecureLock Services

criteria: Message asks about vendor availability rather than assigning a time
Message asks for pricing or a quote
Message describes the work needed (lock rekey) and mentions the property/unit
Message conveys the time sensitivity without being demanding
Message is an inquiry, not a work order
Message is 2-3 sentences max, professional and friendly
